title: Darth Ruyn
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{Youmay|Darth Ruyn, a Sith Lord of the Legacy era|[[Darth Ruin/Legends|Darth Ruin]], a Sith Lord of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]]|linebreak=1}} {{Character |type=Sith |image=[[File:Ruyn.jpg]] |name=Darth Ruyn |homeworld= |birth= |death=[[137 ABY]], [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]][[Legacy (2006) 2|''Legacy'' (2006) 2]] |species=[[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] |gender= |pronouns=He/him |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes=[[Color/Legends|Yellow]] |skin=Red and black [[Sith tattoo]]s |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=*[[One Sith]] *[[Darth Krayt's Galactic Empire]] |masters= |apprentices=[[Darth Talon]] }} {{Dialogue|Darth Ruyn|She is the best I have ever trained, master.|Darth Krayt|Apprentice, has Darth Ruyn been a good teacher?|Darth Talon|He is the ''only'' teacher I have known, lord.|attr=Darth Ruyn tells Darth Krayt that Darth Talon's training is complete|src=}} '''Darth Ruyn''' was an aged [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] who served the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Darth Krayt]] and his [[One Sith]]. He [[Sith training|instructed]] several [[Sith apprentice/Legends|apprentices]] in the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] arts, including the [[Gender/Legends|female]] Twi'lek [[Darth Talon]]. In [[137 ABY]], seven [[Standard year/Legends|years]] after Krayt [[Attack on Emperor Fel|deposed]] [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Galactic Emperor]] [[Roan Fel]] and established his [[Darth Krayt's Galactic Empire|Galactic Empire]] on [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], Ruyn completed Talon's training and presented his apprentice to his Lord. As Talon's final test, Krayt commanded her to [[Death/Legends|kill]] Ruyn, whom she respected and cared for, but a task she nevertheless completed without hesitation. Ruyn made no attempt to block her [[Sai cha/Legends|decapitating]] strike. ==Biography== {{Quote|Do you respect him? Do you care about him?''"
"''Yes, master.''"
"''Kill him.|Darth Krayt and Darth Talon, in the last words Darth Ruyn heard|}} Old at the [[Time/Legends|time]]{{CSWECite|III|117|Ruyn, Darth}} of the conflict between the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]]-backed [[Fel Empire]] and the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] beginning in [[127 ABY]]—known as the [[Sith–Imperial War]][[Star Wars: Legacy (2006) 0|''Star Wars: Legacy'' (2006) 0]]—the [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] Darth Ruyn was a [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] and member of the [[One Sith]] Order under the direction of [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Darth Krayt]]. Ruyn [[Sith training|trained]] [[Sith apprentice/Legends|Sith apprentices]] in the ways of [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of the Force]], the last of which was [[Darth Talon]], a [[Gender/Legends|female]] fellow Twi'lek.[[Legacy (2006) 6|''Legacy'' (2006) 6]] While teaching his apprentice, Ruyn would often take her to the [[Sith Art Chamber]] within the [[Temple of the Sith]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], as he found it conducive to meditation.[[Legacy (2006) 17|''Legacy'' (2006) 17]] [[File:DeathDarthRuyn.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Darth Talon beheads Darth Ruyn on Darth Krayt's orders.]] In [[137 ABY]], seven [[Standard year/Legends|years]] after Krayt [[Attack on Emperor Fel|deposed]] [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Galactic Emperor]] [[Roan Fel]] and established his [[Darth Krayt's Galactic Empire|Sith Empire]] at the end of the Sith-Imperial War, Ruyn completed Talon's training and presented his apprentice to Krayt. The Dark Lord gave Talon one final test: to [[Death/Legends|kill]] her Master, whom she respected and cared for. Talon carried out Krayt's order without hesitation, [[Sai cha/Legends|decapitating]] Ruyn with a sweep of her [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]]. Having passed the test, Talon was given her Sith name and promoted to the position of Krayt's [[Hand (One Sith)|Hand]]—his own personal assassin. Talon would later reflect that had Ruyn not deemed her ready, he would have blocked her attack. Instead, he died so that she could touch the dark side and complete her training. ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|Had my teacher not deemed me ready, he would have blocked my attack. Instead, he embraced death so that I might touch the dark side. Only then was his work in me complete.|Darth Talon, speaking of Darth Ruyn|}} A burly and venerable Twi'lek with [[Color/Legends|yellow]] [[Eye/Legends|eyes]], Darth Ruyn's face and body were fully covered in red and black [[Sith tattoo]]s, like most members of the One Sith Order.[[Legacy (2006) 1|''Legacy'' (2006) 1]] Ruyn was a knowledgeable Sith who considered Darth Talon to be the best apprentice he had ever instructed. Talon believed Ruyn had embraced his death at her hands to complete his work in training her and allow her to touch the dark side. ==Behind the scenes== Darth Ruyn appeared in the second issue of the ''[[Star Wars: Legacy]]'' [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] series, [[Legacy (2006) 2|''Broken, Part 2'']], released in [[July]] [[2006]]. The issue was written by [[John Ostrander]] and [[Jan Duursema]], and was also penciled by Duursema. ==Appearances== *[[Legacy (2006) 2|''Legacy'' (2006) 2]] {{1st}} *[[Legacy (2006) 17|''Legacy'' (2006) 17]] {{Mo}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Darth Ruyn}} {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |cs=Darth Ruyn |de=Darth Ruyn |es=Darth Ruyn |hu=Darth Ruyn |nl=Darth Ruyn |pl=Darth Ruyn |pt=Legends:Darth Ruyn |ptGA=1 }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Ruyn, Darth}} [[Category:Darths]] [[Category:Individuals of unspecified gender]] [[Category:Individuals with he/him pronouns]] [[Category:Sith Lords of Darth Krayt's Galactic Empire]] [[Category:Sith Masters]] [[Category:Twi'leks]]
